subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath created all things through the movement of His Most Exalted Pen, and through that which hath been revealed therefrom hath distinguished between the peoples [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی خلق الاشیاء بحرکه قلمه الاعلی و بما ظهر منه فصل بین الاحزاب
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
